industrial_sets.name: High-Tech Lab / Clean Room
industrial_sets.logic: Cool fluorescent lighting, stainless steel tables, glass beakers, clinical white.
industrial_sets.atmosphere: Zero dust, sterile atmosphere, blue-tinted shadows.

industrial_sets.name: Heavy Duty Factory Floor
industrial_sets.logic: Large pipes, yellow safety railings, concrete floor with oil stains, industrial sparks.
industrial_sets.atmosphere: Gritty, metallic dust, warm amber localized lights.

industrial_sets.name: Shipping Port / Logistics Hub
industrial_sets.logic: Stacked containers, giant cranes, massive ships, harsh coastal sunlight.
industrial_sets.atmosphere: Salty air haze, industrial scale, ocean background.
